title: EcoCraft
description: A modpack with dinosaurs, machines, trains and all kinds of sorts. Have a completely different origin, upgrade your path and level up before your enemies do. Features powerful bosses and weapons to fight them! Recommended with friends! Has a lite version!
body:
![EcoCraft Long Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7e36c445216615770b20c0bc1d97eef2a76c0ecd_0.webp)

## 🌿 MineWorks: EcoCraft

**MineWorks: EcoCraft** is a cooperative RPG-style modpack built around **specialization, fantasy races, immersive survival**, and **deep role progression**. Designed for multiplayer, each player chooses a unique **profession and race**, working together to build a thriving community in a fully reimagined world.

With rich biomes, RPG classes, realistic seasons, powerful machines, voice chat, and performance enhancements, this modpack offers **a complete roleplay and survival sandbox**.

[LITE VERSION HERE!](https://modrinth.com/modpack/ecocraft-lite)

![Dungeon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/86e45d93aca84697072e47ab123d9862b961ffe9.jpeg)

---

### 🧬 Choose Your Race. Master Your Class. Shape the World.

Every player begins by choosing a **race** using the **Origins** mod — from nimble foxes to mystical druids, radiant fairies to spectral beings, each with **distinct strengths, weaknesses, and food needs**.

Then, using **RPG Series mods**, **JobsAddon**, **LevelZ**, and **PartyAddon**, you’ll select a **class and profession** — such as warrior, mage, rogue, blacksmith, fisherman, or farmer — with skills, abilities, and progress trees that shape your gameplay style.

**Examples:**
- 🧚 A Fairy-Mage casting spells from above.
- 🌱 A herbivorous Druid-Herbalist relying on the seasons to grow rare plants.
- 🏹 A Fox-Rogue hunting through forests with stealth and speed.

![Mage Tower](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a2cd3d542bd0deeb6f388c40414ec3a214080615.jpeg)

---

### 🌎 A World Worth Exploring — And Building In

With **Terralith**, **Tectonic**, **Better Nether**, **Better End**, and the full suite of **YUNG's structure mods**, the world is filled with **stunning biomes, dungeons, and ancient ruins** to explore or rebuild.

With **decoration mods** included, you can design **thriving towns and villages** — with blacksmith shops, cozy inns, magical libraries, and bustling markets that give your multiplayer world a lived-in feel.

🌦️ **Serene Seasons** adds dynamic weather and growth cycles, meaning farming and food become strategic, especially for herbivores or carnivores. Surviving winter requires teamwork and preparation.

🏺 **Archaeology:** Unearth ancient structures, relics, and artifacts hidden across the land — your shovel might just reveal more than dirt.

🐾 **New Creatures & Mobs:** Discover wildlife and monsters never seen before in vanilla. Some will run, some will attack — others will stalk.

🧱 **New Dungeons:** Explore handcrafted, procedural structures filled with traps, lore, and loot.

![Huge Mountain](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bfaafec3a59fbfcc61cacfb0c7afe4978e15ccdd.jpeg)

---

### 🔄 New Progression Systems

* 🪓 **Early-Stage Start**: Thanks to the *Early-Stage* mod, your first tools and technology have a new feel. No instant wood-to-stone rush - explore slower, deeper progression.
* 💎 **Beyond Diamond**: With the *TLOTD* mod, diamond isn’t the end. Unlock new tools, armour, and technology, and travel to a **new dimension** with advanced resources and challenges.
* 🎣 **Fishing Mini-game**: Fishing is no longer just waiting — play an active, skill-based mini-game and earn rare loot (and relaxation).

---

### ⚙️ Automate, Organise, and Survive

Build advanced machines and systems with the **Create** mod — automate farming, transport, processing, and more.
Use **Tom's Simple Storage** to manage giant inventories and create full warehouse systems.

🤝 The **party system** allows XP sharing, buffs, and synchronised class growth — essential for a well-organised group.

---

### 💬 Multiplayer-Friendly Tools

* 🧩 **Essential Mod** allows players to **host and join multiplayer games easily** — no server setup required.
* 🎙️ Integrated **Voice Chat mod** makes it easy to **coordinate, roleplay, or joke around in-game** with your friends — no external software needed.
* ⚙️ Includes **many optimisation and immersion mods**, such as better FPS, dynamic sounds, ambient lighting, custom UI tweaks, and more — ensuring the experience is smooth and immersive for all players.

---

### 🗺️ 🧭 RECOMMENDED GAME START SETTINGS

For the best multiplayer experience and early gameplay balance, I recommend modifying Minecraft’s **world border behaviour**:

#### 1️⃣ Set a starting spawn barrier

* Open your world in Creative Mode (or as OP on server).
* Use the command:

  ```
  /worldborder set 250
  /worldborder center ~ ~
  ```

  → This will create a **250-block radius** barrier around spawn.

#### 2️⃣ Configure **Diamond World Border**

* Press **ESC → Mods**
* Search for **Diamond World Border**
* Click **Configure**
* Change the setting to:

  ```
  World Border width per diamond: 50
  ```
  *(This means the border will expand 50 blocks in radius for every diamond dropped at it!)*

  → This ensures your party must **progress through mining and teamwork** to expand their world safely.

---

### ⚠️ System Requirements & Tips

This is a **demanding** modpack. Make sure to:

* Use **at least 16GB RAM** (8GB minimum allocated to Minecraft) (-2GB if not hosting)
* Play with **10+ render distance** for optimal immersion
* Disable shaders manually if needed
* If your PC can't handle this, [try the LITE version instead](https://modrinth.com/modpack/ecocraft-lite)

*Tip: Expect the moodpack to be extra demanding if you're the host*

---

### 🔧 Ideal For:

* RPG fans looking for **class-based multiplayer progression**
* Groups that enjoy **immersive survival and worldbuilding**
* Builders and engineers who love **automation, decoration, and design**
* Players wanting **easy multiplayer hosting and in-game voice chat**
* Adventurers ready to **dig deep — literally — into archaeology and post-diamond content**

- 📌 Fully multiplayer-ready (via Essential Mod or dedicated server)
- 🎤 Voice chat included
- 🚀 Optimised for performance & immersion
- 👥 Best with **3+ players for full experience**
